title: The Blank Page
description: A single line appears on an empty page. It doesn't know where it's going — but it knows it has to move. The first step into an unwritten world.

title: First Line
description: The Wanderer discovers he's not alone. A tiny dot appears — bouncing, curious, alive. Together they learn that even a single point can change the direction of a line.

title: The Smudge
description: Something is wrong with the page. A dark, angry mass of tangled lines is spreading — erasing the careful world The Wanderer has been walking through. The Scribble has arrived.

title: Across the Margin
description: Pushed to the edge of the page, The Wanderer and Dot make a desperate leap across the margin line — the boundary no drawing is supposed to cross.

title: The Well
description: In the margin-lands, they find a pool of pure ink — and the ancient being who guards it. Ink tells them the truth about their world.

title: White Out
description: The Eraser arrives. No warning, no malice — just a white void consuming the page from the corner. The Wanderer watches an entire landscape disappear.

title: Incomplete
description: They meet Sketch — a character who was never finished. Missing an arm and half her face, she's searching for the pen that will complete her.

title: The Ink Runs Dry
description: Ink is dying. Every world they've created has cost them a piece of themselves, and now there's barely enough left to draw a single line.

title: Drawn Together
description: The Scribble returns — but this time, something is different. The chaos isn't attacking. It's reaching out.

title: The Last Page
description: The notebook is running out of pages. Every character must decide: fight for the pages that remain, or find a way to a new notebook entirely.
